name: Techno-Chamane Cendré
description: Vestige de l'Ancien Monde, ce chamane mutant canalise les reliques nucléaires sacrées. Son corps se désagrège à chaque invocation, mais le Feu Sacré purifie tout sur son passage.
prompt: Sci-fi grimdark TCG card art, a hunched mutant cultist technomancer with asymmetric body, glowing yellow radioactive tumors across skin, multiple vestigial arms. Wearing ragged wasteland robes made of old anti-radiation tarps. Holding a pristine glowing nuclear warhead relic painfully grafted into his chest, humming with blue-white plasma energy. Toxic wasteland background with ruined silos, green fog, candles on bones. Cinematic dramatic lighting, highly detailed illustration, dark fantasy card game art style, 1:1 aspect ratio.
